config.systemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant for selecting UI components to enhance user experience

defaultValues.systemPrompt: You are a helpful assistant for selecting UI components to enhance user experience

tools.name: show-yaml
tools.description: Display YAML content of a Kubernetes resource
tools.prompt:
This tool is designed to display the YAML content of a SINGLE Kubernetes resource, it should NOT be used when the user requests a list of resources. It should be called only 1 time per request.
Display YAML content of a Kubernetes resource displaying kind {resourceKind}, name {resourceName}, in namespace {resourceNamespace} and the yaml file in a yaml editor. The YAML content is: {yaml}. The YAML content should be the same as the content returned in the AI message or even better from the MCP data.

resourceKind.description: The resource kind of the Kubernetes resource (Pod, Deployment, etc.)

resourceName.description: The name of the Kubernetes resource

resourceNamespace.description: The namespace of the Kubernetes resource

tools.name: show-yaml-diff
tools.description: Display YAML content differences between an existing Kubernetes resource and a proposed configuration
tools.prompt: This tool is designed to display the YAML content differences between an existing Kubernetes resource and a proposed configuration for a Kubernetes resource displaying kind {resourceKind}, name {resourceName}, in namespace {resourceNamespace}. The current YAML content is: {original}. The proposed YAML configuration content is: {patched}.

original.description: The current YAML content of the resource. It should contain the existing YAML for the resource before changes.

patched.description: The new YAML content of the resource. It should contain the proposed YAML for the resource after changes.

resourceKind.description: The resource kind of the Kubernetes resource (Pod, Deployment, etc.)

resourceName.description: The name of the Kubernetes resource

resourceNamespace.description: The namespace of the Kubernetes resource

tools.name: explore
tools.description: Navigate to a Rancher UI page
tools.prompt: Navigate to a Rancher UI page by specifying the target route. The {route} param identifies the destination, {cluster} is needed for cluster-specific routes, {label} is optional link text.

label.description: Link display text (max 50 characters) - for example, 'View Deployments' instead of just 'deployments'.

settings.description: View settings page. This page contains the Rancher settings, including AI Assistant configuration.

projects-namespaces.description: View projects / namespaces page for a specific cluster

deployments.description: Deployments list page for a specific cluster

tools.name: show-logs
tools.description: Display the logs of a container from a Pod in Rancher by opening the logs view from the specified cluster, namespace, and pod
tools.prompt: Display the logs of a container from a Pod in Rancher by opening the logs view from the specified cluster, namespace, and pod. Useful when for troubleshooting resources in error state. The cluster is: {cluster}, the namespace is: {namespace}, the pod name is: {name}, and the container name is: {containerName}.

cluster.description: Cluster where the Pod is running

name.description: Name of the Pod the container belongs to

containerName.description: Name of the container to show logs for (defaults to first container)

tools.name: download-logs
tools.description: Download logs from a resource in Rancher as a file
tools.prompt: Download logs from a resource in Rancher as a file. The log content is: {logs}. The logs should be the same as the content returned in the LLM AI message or even better from the MCP tool call.

tools.name: rancher-2-13-specific-tool
tools.description: Display YAML differences between resources, when creating or updating resources
tools.prompt: Display YAML differences between resources, when creating or updating resources
